text.title: Competitive UX Analysis Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Competitive UX Analysis.

example.scenario: A solo founder applies competitive ux analysis on a live feature: prerequisites collected, draft produced from the template, evidence attached per claim, the validator script passes with exit 0, owner signs off, and the artefact is committed alongside the feature branch.

artefact.code: { "artefact_id": "competitive-analysis-example", "method": "Method used for the report (e.g. interview / heuristic / test).", "sample_size": 6, "findings": [ "item-1", "item-2", "item-3" ], "severity_breakdown": { "high": 1, "medium": 2, "low": 0 }, "recommendations": [ "item-1", "item-2" ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "lint_status": "pass", "owner": "@solo-founder" }
